mapper.select: SELECT CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) AS type, CAST(al.event_date AS CHAR(30)) AS date, CASE CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(c.name, ''), ' 수업 ', COALESCE(CAST(al.status AS CHAR(20)), '')) ELSE COALESCE(al.note, CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30))) END AS title, CASE WHEN al.old_value IS NOT NULL OR al.new_value IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(al.old_value, '(없음)'), ' → ', COALESCE(al.new_value, '(없음)')) ELSE NULL END AS detail, CASE CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN COALESCE(CAST(al.status AS CHAR(20)), '출석') WHEN 'MEMBER_CREATE' THEN '등록' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_ASSIGN' THEN '등록' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_UPDATE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_DELETE' THEN '삭제' WHEN 'CLASS_ASSIGN' THEN '배정' WHEN 'INFO_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_REQUEST' THEN '대기' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_APPROVE' THEN '승인' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_REJECT' THEN '반려' WHEN 'REFUND_REQUEST' THEN '대기' WHEN 'REFUND_APPROVE' THEN '승인' WHEN 'REFUND_REJECT' THEN '반려' ELSE '-' END AS status FROM member_activity_log al LEFT JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = al.class_seq WHERE al.member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY al.event_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) AS type, CAST(al.event_date AS CHAR(30)) AS date, CASE CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(c.name, ''), ' 수업 ', COALESCE(CAST(al.status AS CHAR(20)), '')) ELSE COALESCE(al.note, CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30))) END AS title, CASE WHEN al.old_value IS NOT NULL OR al.new_value IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(al.old_value, '(없음)'), ' → ', COALESCE(al.new_value, '(없음)')) ELSE NULL END AS detail, CASE CAST(al.event_type AS CHAR(30)) WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN COALESCE(CAST(al.status AS CHAR(20)), '출석') WHEN 'STATUS_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'CLASS_ASSIGN' THEN '배정' WHEN 'INFO_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'REFUND_CHANGE' THEN '변경' ELSE '-' END AS status FROM member_activity_log al LEFT JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = al.class_seq WHERE al.member_seq = #{staffSeq} ORDER BY al.event_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
